case_title: WELSS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. MONIQUE RIZZO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: AFFIDAVIT OF MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100041721) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $373.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100041721) AS TO DEFENDANT RIZZO, MONIQUE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIZZO, MONIQUE $6,360.41 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $373.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,658.81, SEE SCANNED DOC
